report.summary: checkout api is failing because a required dependency is unavailable, causing a 42.9% error rate across 14 probes.

runs.title: Redis timeout storm on cart reads

report.summary: cart api is timing out on an upstream dependency; p95 latency reached 2840 ms while request failures climbed to 31.3%.
checkout api remains reachable, but saturation is pushing p95 latency to 3410 ms and repeatedly breaching the latency budget.
payments api is rejecting traffic after an auth or secret change, with 30.8% of probes failing immediately.
